mandate: Fix broken dashboard interactions — dropdowns, callbacks, feedback, error states
keyFindings: The assign dropdown in InboxView and AIDraftCard both needed useRef + document mousedown listeners for click-outside-to-close
DashboardClient had a no-op onPartnerEmailUpdate — fixed by adding localCouple state that tracks mutations
The TRIAL_CHAR_LIMIT=120 was silently truncating AI drafts — removed truncation, kept validation with a clear explanation
HomeView and ProfileView copy buttons had no feedback — added copied state with 2s timeout and catch handler
CircleView had no error state — added loadError state with retry button
Removed emoji from HomeView countdown and stat tiles per brand language guidelines
whatWorked: Small surgical fixes across 8 files. Each fix was independent. No cascading changes needed.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The trial char limit explanation is a stopgap. When Stripe plans are enforced, the limit should tie to the plan tier. The CircleView error state pattern (loadError + retry function) is a good template for other views.
spiritContribution: Every interaction now gives feedback. Dropdowns close, copies confirm, errors explain, limits are transparent.
